Strain and pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teaspoons of tea into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. Strain and pour the tea into the serving pitcher Add ice and top up with cold water. Item Name: Biotta Organic Celery Root Juice - 100% Celery Juice Superfood For Kidney Support, Immune Support & Hydration - Good Source of Potassium (16.9 Fl Oz, Pk of 6)
Bullet Point 1: IDEAL JUICE CLEANSE: This purifying green drink is made from freshly harvested celery root. With the flavor of celery, this juice is light, crisp and refreshing, with a hint of sweetness.
Bullet Point 2: STIMULATES KIDNEY FUNCTION: Your kidneys are important organs that require key nutrients to operate optimally. Celery can help rid your body of the bad stuff, and balance out your pH!
Bullet Point 3: REHYDRATE & REPLENISH: Celery helps to cleanse and detoxify while simultaneously rehydrating the body. It also acts as a natural antioxidant, providing the body with an optimal immune system.
Bullet Point 4: ORGANIC CELERY: Organic Celery Root Juice is 100% vegetable juice with no added colors, flavors, or sugars. Is 100% natural juice in its natural form - never diluted, not from concentrate.
Bullet Point 5: SWISS QUALITY: Biotta has been organic since its founding in 1957. Certified USDA organic and Non-GMO Project Verified. Gluten free and vegan! Biotta juices are produced in fully-recyclable glass bottles, made in a zero-carbon facility with a “bee hotel” on-site to protect pollinators. Shelf stable and pasteurized for safety.
Value: 101.4
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium organic juice positioned as a health-focused superfood with strong functional claims. The brand emphasizes high-quality, sustainable sourcing (USDA Organic, Non-GMO, vegan, and gluten-free certifications) and eco-conscious packaging (recyclable glass bottles). Competitive pricing for organic juice in the health/wellness niche, with a multi-pack discount opportunity for bulk buyers.
